prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo system for the K20C1 engine featuring a Garrett GT3076R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm billet compressor wheel) with a custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe and a GReddy Revolution RS 3.5-inch cat-back exhaust system, paired with a Hondata KPro4 standalone ECU reflash targeting 380-400whp on E85 fuel with a 22psi boost curve

Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilover suspension kit (FL5-specific valving, 2-way adjustable dampers, 24-position rebound adjustment) with custom spring rates (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear) and spherical bearing front upper mounts from Hardrace for reduced compliance

Brembo GT 6-piston 380mm front brake kit (Type R FL5-specific caliper brackets, 36mm pistons, 380x34mm two-piece rotors with aluminum hats) paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Motul RBF 660 racing brake fluid for fade resistance under sustained 1.5g deceleration
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS FL5-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper with integrated diffuser) paired with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and exposed carbon weave accents on the hood and roof

Voltex Type 3 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,700mm width, 300mm chord, 120mm height) with custom aluminum pedestals and Gurney flap, mounted to the FL5's factory roof reinforcement points for OEM+ rigidity

Recaro SP-G TS II front seats (Honda-specific side mounts, carbon fiber backshells) wrapped in Alcantara with red Nappa leather bolsters, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a Momo Mod.77 350mm suede wheel for improved ergonomics and weight reduction
